llm_eval.notes: Compiles/runs (48 skills PASS) but two real defects: (1) dead leftover loop lines 107-108 'for tok in findall: pass'; (2) stale path 'creator-kit/skills' in skill_exists and _collect_inbound_refs vs actual 'plugins/harness-creator/skills' (drifts from docstring/error msgs); only works because .claude/skills is deployed in sync, would false-positive Step7-3/7-5 on fresh checkout. except OSError is appropriately scoped, not bare. Non-fatal but genuine quality debt.
